task_completion.description: Verify that a Market Analyzer window is open in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window titled 'Market Analyzer' is visible within the NinjaTrader 8 interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required instruments (SPY, AAPL, MSFT) have been added to the Market Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Instrument column in the Market Analyzer window lists 'SPY', 'AAPL', and 'MSFT' as rows.

task_completion.description: Verify that an RSI column has been added to the Market Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column header indicating 'RSI' is visible in the Market Analyzer window, or RSI is listed in the 'Configured' section of the Columns settings window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the RSI period is set to 14.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column header explicitly shows 'RSI(14)', or the Properties panel for the RSI column shows the 'Period' parameter set to 14.

task_completion.description: Verify that conditional formatting is set for the RSI column (Red for >70, Green for <30).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Condition Builder or Properties window for the RSI column shows rules for 'Value > 70' with a Red background and 'Value < 30' with a Green background, OR the Market Analyzer cells visually display these background colors correctly based on the RSI values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Workspace' dialog is visible, or the Workspaces menu shows the current workspace being saved (e.g., clicking 'Save' on the active workspace).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the Market Analyzer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 menus, right-click context menus, and configuration dialogs rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard NinjaTrader 8 desktop application, not a mock-up, browser, or image editor.

integrity.description: Verify the conditional formatting was configured via the software's built-in features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formatting rules are seen in the official NinjaTrader 'Columns' or 'Condition Builder' dialogs, rather than being artificially painted or edited onto the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: SPY, AAPL, and MSFT are real trading instruments. RSI (Relative Strength Index) is a standard momentum oscillator. The requested period of 14, overbought threshold of >70, and oversold threshold of <30 are industry standards established by J. Welles Wilder. The NinjaTrader 8 Market Analyzer is a real feature that supports adding RSI as a custom column and applying conditional cell background colors based on these thresholds.
